basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website jncasr.ac.in. A total of 1 Research Associate vacancy has been announced through the JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in chemistry, materials chemistry, or physics with at least one research paper published in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal
qualification.details: Ph.D. in chemistry, materials chemistry, or physics with at least one research paper published in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal. Those candidates who have submitted thesis but has not defended can apply for Research Associate (Provisional).

salary_details.details: Rs. 46,800 p.m. plus HRA (Provisional) or Rs. 58,000/61,000/67,000 p.m. plus HRA

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.jawaharlal_nehru_centre_for_advanced_sci: Ph.D. in chemistry, materials chemistry, or physics with at least one research paper published in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNCASR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNCASR Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in chemistry, materials chemistry, or physics with at least one research paper published in Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal. Those candidates who have submitted thesis but has not defended can apply for Research Associate (Provisional).

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 46,800 p.m. plus HRA (Provisional) or Rs. 58,000/61,000/67,000 p.m. plus HRA

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at JNCASR is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Ph.D. in chemistry, materials chemistry, or physics and have at least one research paper published in a Science Citation Index (SCI) Journal.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Please refer to the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position at JNCASR will involve an online interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 46,800 to Rs. 67,000 per month, plus HRA, depending on the specific provision.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates who have submitted their thesis but not yet defended apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have submitted their thesis but have not yet defended can apply for the Research Associate (Provisional) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this position is via email. Candidates need to send their applications electronically.

faq.question: Q10. Where is JNCASR located?
faq.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) is located in Bangalore, Karnataka, with the pincode 560064.
